div1.entryFree: Theoric, theory (opposed to practice): had the whole t. of war in the knot of his scarf, and the practice in the chape of his dagger, All's IV, 3, 162. the art and practic part of life must be the mistress to this t. H5 I, 1, 52. the bookish t., wherein the toged consuls can propose as masterly as he, Oth. I, 1, 24.
